message:
fix(signal): prevent stop hook infinite loop with state-based dedup (gt-3eyls)

The stop hook fires at every turn boundary. When it blocks (unread mail or
hooked work found), the condition persists across turns, causing the same
block reason to fire repeatedly and fill the entire agent context.

Fix: Track the last block reason in a per-agent state file. If the same
reason would fire again, approve instead of blocking. When conditions
clear (no block reason), delete the state so future conditions trigger
fresh notifications. When conditions change, the new reason fires.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
